topIngredients.name: Melaleuca Alternifolia (Tea Tree)
topIngredients.benefit: Natural antimicrobial that targets acne-causing bacteria

topIngredients.name: Centella Asiatica
topIngredients.benefit: K-beauty staple that soothes redness and speeds healing

topIngredients.name: Glycerin
topIngredients.benefit: Sheet mask base that prevents moisture evaporation

verdict: Mediheal Tea Tree mask is a reliable K-beauty solution for blemish-prone skin. The tea tree concentration is sufficient to be antimicrobial without causing excessive dryness. Best used once or twice weekly during breakout periods.
